cmd:
set -e
DATA_DIR=/var/lib/easyenclave/data
until [ -x /var/lib/easyenclave/bin/devopsdefender ]; do sleep 1; done
mkdir -p "$DATA_DIR/codex/home" "$DATA_DIR/codex/work" "$DATA_DIR/dd-shell" "$DATA_DIR/codex/bin"
cat > "$DATA_DIR/codex/codex-podman-shell" <<'EOF'
#!/bin/sh
set -e
BIN=/var/lib/easyenclave/bin
DATA_DIR=/var/lib/easyenclave/data
until [ -x "$BIN/podman" ]; do echo 'codex-podman-shell: waiting for podman'; sleep 2; done
mkdir -p "$DATA_DIR/codex/home" "$DATA_DIR/codex/work"
exec "$BIN/podman" run --rm -it \
  --name codex-shell-$$ \
  -e HOME=/root \
  -e TERM=xterm-256color \
  -e COLORTERM=truecolor \
  -e NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX=/root/.npm-global \
  -v "$DATA_DIR/codex/home:/root" \
  -v "$DATA_DIR/codex/work:/workspace" \
  -w /workspace \
  docker.io/library/node:22-bookworm \
  sh -lc 'set -e; mkdir -p "$HOME/.npm-global/bin"; printf "%s\n" "export PATH=\$HOME/.npm-global/bin:\$PATH" >> "$HOME/.profile"; export PATH="$HOME/.npm-global/bin:$PATH"; if ! command -v codex >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm install -g @openai/codex; fi; exec bash -l'
EOF
chmod +x "$DATA_DIR/codex/codex-podman-shell"
cp /var/lib/easyenclave/bin/devopsdefender "$DATA_DIR/codex/bin/devopsdefender"
chmod +x "$DATA_DIR/codex/bin/devopsdefender"
exec "$DATA_DIR/codex/bin/devopsdefender" shell
